title: Ordzaar
summary: Built the initial fully-decentralised browser-based marketplace from scratch. Operated entirely on-chain without reliance on traditional databases. Grew beyond a single developer into Cake's fifth product vertical, then spun out as an independent startup.
outcome: Became CakeDefi's 5th business vertical, then independent startup

title: SADO Protocol
tagline: Decentralised trading protocol for Bitcoin Ordinals
summary: Designed and built a trustless peer-to-peer trading protocol using IPFS for storing semi-signed transactions (PSBTs) with content identifiers published on-chain. Supports 3-step instant purchasing and 6-step bidding mechanisms. Expanded into Sado.Space — a suite of open-source tools.
outcome: Adopted by Ordzaar and third-party exchanges; open-source SDK ecosystem

title: CoKeeps
tagline: Malaysia's first regulated Digital Asset Custodian
summary: Co-founded and funded through R1 — providing two years of product development capital and three years of operational funding while awaiting regulatory approval. Designed compliance architecture, KYC/AML pipelines, and custody infrastructure. Emerged from Project Castor — the SC Malaysia blockchain blueprint Mark advised on.
outcome: First company in Malaysia approved as a regulated Digital Asset Custodian

title: Moddable Games
tagline: Open-source games studio using AI-augmented engineering
summary: Shipped four games, two open-source engines (70-variant chess engine with AI and opening books + hex map framework), nine mods, and a developer tools platform in 16 days. Built entirely using LLM-driven development workflows. Custom PDF pagination engine producing 190+ page rulebook libraries.
outcome: 4 games, 2 engines, 9 mods — all live and public in 16 days

title: Oviato
summary: Co-founded and led the technical pivot from consumer app to passkey-native wallet-as-a-service infrastructure. Built on Project Eden — a weekend hackathon prototype demonstrating WebAuthN-based crypto wallets without passwords. The pivot secured DraperVC investment.
outcome: Secured DraperVC investment; pivoted from consumer app to B2B infrastructure

title: Neuroware
summary: Launched at TechCrunch Disrupt London after 500 Startups Batch 9. Raised US$300K+ that sustained operations for five years. Built open-source blockchain wallet and SDK infrastructure handling 1M+ API requests. The only Malaysian company in Deloitte's Top 50 Global RegTech.
outcome: Deloitte Top 50 RegTech, VentureBeat Top 5, $300K+ raised, TechCrunch Disrupt

title: R1
tagline: 13 years of blockchain infrastructure, from first principles
summary: Holding and operating company behind Neuroware, CoKeeps, Blockchain Embassy, and more. First company in the SC Malaysia regulatory sandbox. Enterprise clients include DBS Bank and Baker Hostetler.
outcome: First SC Malaysia sandbox company, incubated 5+ ventures, advised national regulators
